faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Malverne typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500, depending on the size of your property, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees before beginning any work.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Malverne?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and EPA-approved chemical treatments for Malverne properties. Heat treatment eliminates bed bugs in a single day by raising room temperatures to lethal levels, while chemical treatments may require multiple visits but work well for sensitive areas. Our technicians will recommend the best approach based on your specific situation.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide bed bug service in Malverne?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day emergency bed bug service throughout Malverne and Long Island. Our local technicians are strategically positioned to respond quickly to your call, and we understand that bed bug infestations require immediate attention to prevent spreading.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your bed bug treatments in Malverne?
faqs.answer: Yes, all our bed bug treatments in Malverne come with a comprehensive 90-day warranty. If bed bugs return within that period, we'll re-treat your property at no additional charge. We also provide detailed prevention guidance and follow-up inspections to ensure complete eradication.
